name: File' Gumbo Lafayette
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green onions with tops, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw okra and sauté in Beef-Frye drippings or shortening for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Add onions, celery, and garlic and cook about 5 minutes more.
3. Stir in flour.
4. Add hot water, stirring constantly, and cook until slightly thickened.
5. Add tomatoes, salt, pepper, and bay leaf; cover.
6. Simmer on low heat for an additional 20 minutes.
7. Remove bay leaf and stir in Tabasco sauce.
8. De-bone and skin salmon and add to the gumbo.
9. Heat thoroughly.
10. Add a dash of File' just before serving.
11. Serve in soup bowls or plates over hot cooked rice.
